channel.title: Controva LLC — Insights & Engineering
channel.description: Engineering-driven insights on Headless Commerce, AI Automation, and B2B Growth Strategy.

item.title: Why Monolithic E-Commerce is Dead: The ROI of Headless Shopify
item.description: A technical breakdown of why enterprise brands are abandoning traditional Shopify setups for Next.js and Sanity, and how it directly impacts conversion rates.

item.title: Stop Paying Humans for Data Entry: The Ultimate AI Automation Pipeline
item.description: How we built an autonomous lead qualification system using LLMs and Zapier that processes 10,000 leads per day with zero human intervention.

item.title: The "Zero-Risk" Offer: Why Performance Marketing Outperforms Retainers
item.description: Traditional agency retainers align incentives poorly. Discover the mathematics behind performance-based marketing and why it guarantees better ROI.

item.title: Migrating from Shopify Plus to Next.js: A Performance Breakdown
item.description: An inside look at the architecture decisions, caching strategies, and performance metrics behind a $10M/year store migration.
